official_status_source_name: Austin Metro Baseball League rainout and game weather outlook page
future_status_protocol: AMBL rainout.php publishes field-specific weather impact, rain chance, expected rain, recent rain, scheduled games, and says only an AMBL-posted Rainout or Postponed status is official. It also states that when a game is recorded as 777 or 999, its rainout/rain-impact chance is shown as 100%. Keep polling disabled until Rainout Source has a conservative parser that can identify explicit AMBL Rainout/Postponed or 777/999 game records without confusing weather impact with cancellation.
agent_rule: Official AMBL status wins for Downs Field. Use AMBL rainout.php for the league weather-impact protocol and scheduled-game outlook, but do not treat weather impact, rain chance, or a listed scheduled game as an official cancellation or playable confirmation. If the page explicitly shows Rainout, Postponed, or game code 777/999, report that as official; otherwise official status remains unknown and agents should tell the user to check the AMBL rainout page before leaving.
